nasb.text: Many of those who sleep in the dust of the ground will awake, these to everlasting life, but the others to disgrace and everlasting contempt.

esv.text: And many of those who sleep in the dust of the earth shall awake, some to everlasting life, and some to shame and everlasting contempt.

cnv.text: 必有許多睡在塵土中的人醒過來，有的要得永生，有的要受羞辱，永遠被憎惡。

ccb.text: 许多长眠地下的人必醒过来，有些得到永生，有些蒙受羞辱，永远被憎恶。
